text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Ines Fujin and I complete the day's
training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We did great out there! Feels like our training
session went by in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I've got a delivery job lined up after
this. I think I might use it to get some solo
training in.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I usually use my bike when I'm making
deliveries, but this time I'll use my legs!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Being able to sweat it out on my shift makes
delivering the perfect job for training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin might be raring to go, but she could
very well overexert herself if she delivers
everything on foot...
choice_data_list: You'll strain yourself, so ride your bike instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin makes her deliveries with all the vigor
she can muster, building up her strength in the
process.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I guess if I end up exhausting myself, I
won't be in any state to do my regular training...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Got it! If that's what you think's best, I'll go on my
bike!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Earnestly heeding my request, Ines Fujin takes
care not to overwork herself.
